extraction.one_line_summary: GEOGHEGAN HART Tao won stage 15 after solo attack by DENNIS Rohan failed with 1:03 gap at 10km to go, ALMEIDA held pink by 37 seconds despite visible exhaustion.
tactical_patterns: DENNIS launched solo attack 46km out after recognizing peloton cutting gap to three minutes, exploiting breakaway disintegration.
NTT forced into dual chasing duty after SOBRERO crash weakened support structure, revealing team fragility under personnel attrition.
INEOS rode defensively following wheels despite GEOGHEGAN HART's strength, suggesting team hierarchy confusion or GC calculation shift.
ALMEIDA's 37-second gap minimal given extreme visible exhaustion, signaling imminent GC collapse more reliably than time gaps.

rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: First GT stage win while looking comfortable following wheels suggests sandbagging earlier, now under 3min deficit makes podium viable.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: Described as 'absolutely exhausted' while keeping pink by only 15sec over KELDERMAN indicates maglia rosa tenure ending imminently.
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: Recognized peloton acceleration pattern at 46km out and preemptively went solo, showing tactical awareness beyond typical breakaway riding.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Distanced on Pian Cavallo climb where he'd previously performed, eliminating him as viable GC threat in final week.
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: Finished 2sec behind stage winner while HINDLEY rode hard for him, confirming SUNWEB dual-leader strategy favoring Kelderman.
rider_signals.VISCONTI Giovanni: neutral: Won first KOM but dropped DENNIS on long climb, exposing pure climber weakness in sustained power efforts.
